{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324092533EB3C86DC2B59AF53A6CD"}"},"total":27},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7591000224841351961","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"给阿鸡留下清晰的痕迹，加更，加更，加更！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767420457,"group_id":"7383261564704394302","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Ui/jOyagy6B7s4/2CthFW39G843CsIgR5fhLsD/rEg","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2955952836317080","user_name":"孤独的→_→"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2955952836317080","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7383261564704394302","book_info":{"abstract":"（多女主，玄幻，走肾走心，剧情慢热不速推）
云中雁鹤在，章华白衣来。要问红尘真颜色？人道楚王风采。
说的，便是如今天子，万庆帝的亲弟弟，楚王云章。
作为当今天子的亲弟弟，云章在封地生活那叫一个滋润，平日里大部分时间都是在花天酒地，混迹在勾栏花柳之中，过着声色犬马的混混日子，似乎已然没有了当初的锐气。
直到那一天之后，人们才再一次见到被称为真颜色的楚王那无伦风采。
万庆八年，万庆帝驾崩于京城韶阳宫，万庆帝膝下无子，朝中拥立河青王云楷为帝，年号开乾，登基之后，权臣和他所拥立的开乾帝，二人的目光，首先注视的，便是在楚地的云章。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o5e8aef66b977cbdc2c9f895727d8f1eb~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"开摆的阿鸡","author_id":"","book_id":"7383261564704394302","book_name":"绝世藩王开局被暗算依旧天下无敌","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6751人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7532496989540319806","read_count":"6751","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"253899"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"102","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,奇幻仙侠,武侠,魂穿,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2972e4c5788d280c81df08fe88b20e71~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779499533&x-signature=Hw2no9BA7Zk%2BKC4ctWejE0iP%2FKc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"101392821418","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324092533EB3C86DC2B59AF53A6CD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"1
